final_prompt: Eye-level photograph of a sunlit indoor still life featuring exactly two distinct bouquets of roses on a rustic wooden table. The table, characterized by warm brown tones, visible grain, and knots, occupies the bottom 50% of the frame. Spatial arrangement: A bouquet of deep red roses with green leaves is positioned strictly on the left side, while a separate bouquet of light pink and mauve roses with green foliage is positioned strictly on the right side. A clear, empty gap separates the two arrangements; no ribbons or ties are present. Lighting: Bright natural sunlight streams from a window in the left background, casting sharp, diagonal shadows of both bouquets across the wood surface toward the right. Background: A soft, out-of-focus beige wall with a bright white window frame visible on the left. Atmosphere: Warm and serene, highlighting velvety petal textures and wood grain.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a sunlit indoor scene featuring two separate, independent bouquets of roses resting on a rustic wooden table. The table has a warm brown finish with visible wood grain and knots, occupying the lower half of the frame. On the left side of the table stands a bouquet composed primarily of deep red roses with green leaves, and on the right side stands a second bouquet featuring lighter pink and mauve roses, also with green foliage. Unlike the original single arrangement, these two bunches are distinct and separated by a small gap, with no ribbon tying them together. Sunlight streams in strongly from a window located on the left side of the frame (background), casting sharp, diagonal shadows of the two separate bouquets onto the wooden surface towards the right. The background consists of a soft, out-of-focus beige wall and the bright white frame of the window on the left. The atmosphere is warm and serene, highlighting the velvety texture of the flower petals and the natural grain of the wood. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: Eye-level view facing the bouquet directly; Spatial positions: Bouquet is in the CENTER foreground; Window is in the LEFT background; Wooden table occupies the BOTTOM half; Dominant color palette: Deep reds and pinks (flowers), dark green (ribbon/leaves), warm brown (table), soft white/beige (background); Lighting quality + direction: Bright natural sunlight streaming from the LEFT, casting distinct shadows to the RIGHT. Style reference: Dominant color palette: Deep reds and pinks (flowers), dark green (ribbon/leaves), warm brown (table), soft white/beige (background); Dominant color palette: Deep reds and pinks (flowers), dark green (ribbon/leaves), warm brown (table), soft white/beige (background); Spatial positions: Bouquet is in the CENTER foreground; Window is in the LEFT background; Wooden table occupies the BOTTOM half; Overall atmosphere: Warm, serene, sunlit indoor still life.

constraints: The image contains exactly two separate bouquets of roses.
The two bouquets are distinct and separated by a visible gap, not tied together.
The bouquet on the left side consists primarily of deep red roses with green leaves.
The bouquet on the right side consists primarily of light pink and mauve roses with green foliage.
The bouquets rest on a rustic wooden table with a warm brown finish, visible wood grain, and knots.
The wooden table occupies the lower half of the frame.
A window is visible in the background on the left side of the frame.
Bright sunlight streams from the left, casting sharp, diagonal shadows of the bouquets towards the right on the table surface.
The background features a soft, out-of-focus beige wall.
The camera viewpoint is eye-level, facing the bouquets directly.
No ribbons are visible tying the bouquets together.
